query:
UPDATE lti_platforms
           SET last_health_check_at = NOW(),
               last_health_check_status = $2,
               invalid_client_since = CASE
                   WHEN $4 THEN NULL
                   WHEN $3 AND invalid_client_since IS NULL THEN NOW()
                   ELSE invalid_client_since
               END,
               updated_at = NOW()
           WHERE id = $1
